title: Fix: Beneficial ingredients not displaying correctly on Product Detail page
description:
## Bug Report

When viewing a product detail page, the beneficial ingredients list should show 3 items (Niacinamide, Hyaluronic Acid, Vitamin E) but sometimes shows empty.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Navigate to product detail page (http://localhost:4000)
2. Look at the 'Ingredients Analysis' section
3. Verify that 'Beneficial ingredients' list shows 3 items

## Expected Behavior
- Beneficial ingredients list displays: Niacinamide, Hyaluronic Acid, Vitamin E
- Each ingredient shows its effect
- 'Analyze Product' button triggers AI analysis after ~1s
- Status shows 'Analysis complete' after clicking

## Actual Behavior
List sometimes renders empty on slow connections.

## Labels
- bug
- frontend
- product-detail
